text.title: Design Tokens Basics Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply Design Tokens Basics end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: audit
step.input: current hex codes + spacing + typography in code
step.action: Catalogue raw values; bucket into the six categories.

step.name: define-aliases
step.action: Name alias tokens referencing bases (e.g. color.action.primary → color.blue.500).

step.name: build-pipeline
step.action: Generate consumer outputs (CSS vars, Swift, Tailwind).

step.name: write-docs
step.action: Document each token with description + usage example.
